---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

**Example:**
> I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 🚀 Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 📝 Usage Example

Show how this feature would be used:

```typescript
// Example API usage
import { useNewFeature } from '@inheritage-foundation/sdk'

function MyComponent() {
  const { data } = useNewFeature({ param: 'value' })
  // ...
}
```

## 🎨 API Design

If applicable, describe the proposed API:

```typescript
interface NewFeatureOptions {
  param1: string
  param2?: number
}

function newFeature(options: NewFeatureOptions): Promise<Result>
```

## 🤔 Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📚 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

## 🎯 Use Cases

Who will benefit from this feature? What are the main use cases?

- [ ] React developers building heritage apps
- [ ] AI/ML engineers using embeddings
- [ ] Researchers accessing cultural data
- [ ] Museum aggregators (CIDOC/LIDO)
- [ ] Other: ___________

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar feature requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with the SDK's goals and scope
- [ ] I have described clear use cases
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional)

## 🔗 Related Issues

Link to any related issues or discussions.

---

**Thank you for your suggestion!** We appreciate community input that helps make the SDK better.
